questions.question: Describe the fundamental difference between a decision tree and a flowchart, highlighting the key concept of 'no branching' in decision trees. (15 marks)
What is the time complexity of a decision tree for the 'subset sum' problem, and how does it relate to the time complexity of a brute-force algorithm with exponential search? (10 marks)
Explain how the reduction from 3-SAT to the binary knapsack problem can be used to show that the 3-SAT problem is NP-complete. (15 marks)
